_comment: Intentional backlog runner model mappings. Codex defaults resolve to gpt-5.4, while Claude aliases support Sonnet and Opus role defaults.

model_crosswalk._comment: Cross-tool fallbacks for the current supported Claude aliases and the default Codex model.

_notes.claude: See: claude --model <alias|name>. Aliases: sonnet, opus, haiku.
_notes.codex: See: codex exec --model <name>. Backlog runner Codex-backed taskCode and code roles intentionally default to gpt-5.4.
